
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>SMCTI Science Lab Inventory System</title>
<style>
  :root {
    --navy: #123a72;
    --navy-dark: #0c2a54;
    --blue: #1d5bbf;
    --blue-light: #eaf1fb;
    --border: #dde5f0;
    --text: #1a2333;
    --muted: #6b7688;
    --gray-bar: #4b4f56;
    --danger: #c0392b;
    --danger-light: #fdecec;
    --white: #ffffff;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    font-family: -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
    background: #eef2f7;
    color: var(--text);
  }

  button, input { font-family: inherit; }

  /* ---------- Top strip ---------- */
  .top-bar {
    background: var(--navy-dark);
    color: white;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 10px 20px;
    font-size: 12.5px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.6px;
  }

  /* ---------- Header ---------- */
  header.main-header {
    background: white;
    padding: 18px 32px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 18px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .brand { display: flex; align-items: center; }

  .brand-logo-img { height: 66px; width: auto; display: block; }

  .contact-info { display: flex; gap: 26px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .contact-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
  .contact-icon {
    width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--blue-light);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--blue);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .contact-icon svg { width: 17px; height: 17px; }
  .contact-item .label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
  .contact-item .value { font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }

  /* ---------- Toolbar ---------- */
  .toolbar { background: var(--gray-bar); padding: 16px 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }

  .search-box { flex: 1; min-width: 220px; position: relative; }
  .search-box svg { position: absolute; left: 16px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 17px; height: 17px; color: #8a8a8a; pointer-events: none; }
  .search-box input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px 12px 44px; border-radius: 24px; border: none; font-size: 14px; }

  .tabs { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .tab-btn {
    padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 20px; border: 2px solid white;
    background: white; color: var(--blue); font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px; cursor: pointer; transition: background .15s, color .15s; white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .tab-btn.active { background: var(--blue); color: white; border-color: var(--blue); }
  .tab-btn:hover:not(.active) { background: var(--blue-light); }
  .tab-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid white; outline-offset: 2px; }

  .menu-icon {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer;
    padding: 10px; border: none; background: transparent; margin-left: 4px; border-radius: 8px;
    transition: background .15s;
  }
  .menu-icon:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); }
  .menu-icon span { width: 24px; height: 3px; background: white; border-radius: 2px; }

  /* ---------- Main / table ---------- */
  main { max-width: 1200px; margin: 26px auto; padding: 0 24px 40px; }

  .card { background: white; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 22px rgba(18,58,114,0.09); overflow: hidden; }

  .table-scroll { overflow-x: auto; }
  table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; min-width: 620px; }

  thead th { background: var(--navy); color: white; text-align: left; padding: 15px 20px; font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
  thead th:first-child { width: 56px; }

  tbody td { padding: 15px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 14.5px; }
  tbody tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
  tbody tr:hover { background: var(--blue-light); }

  .type-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: capitalize; background: var(--blue-light); color: var(--blue); }
  .type-liquid, .type-equipment, .type-prepared { background: #fdeeda; color: #a35c09; }

  .empty-state { padding: 44px; text-align: center; color: var(--muted); font-size: 14px; }

  .pagination { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 18px 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .page-btn {
    min-width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid var(--blue);
    background: white; color: var(--blue); font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13.5px; padding: 0 12px;
    transition: background .15s, color .15s;
  }
  .page-btn.active { background: var(--blue); color: white; }
  .page-btn:hover:not(.active):not(:disabled) { background: var(--blue-light); }
  .page-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }
  .page-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--navy); outline-offset: 2px; }

  footer.note { text-align: center; padding: 18px 10px 0; font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; }

  /* ---------- Manage modal ---------- */
  .modal-overlay {
    position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(10,20,40,0.55);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 24px; z-index: 1000;
  }
  .modal-overlay.hidden { display: none; }

  .modal-panel {
    background: white; border-radius: 16px; width: 100%; max-width: 560px;
    max-height: 88vh; overflow-y: auto; box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    animation: modalIn .18s ease;
  }
  @keyframes modalIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

  .modal-header {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 20px 24px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); position: sticky; top: 0; background: white; border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0;
  }
  .modal-header h2 { font-size: 18px; color: var(--navy); }
  .close-btn { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: var(--muted); padding: 6px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; }
  .close-btn:hover { background: var(--blue-light); color: var(--navy); }
  .close-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; display: block; }

  .modal-body { padding: 20px 24px 24px; }

  .modal-tabs { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .modal-tab-btn {
    padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 16px; border: 2px solid var(--blue);
    background: white; color: var(--blue); font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer;
  }
  .modal-tab-btn.active { background: var(--blue); color: white; }

  .section-label { font-size: 12.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; }

  .form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .form-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
  .form-field label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--muted); }
  .form-field input { padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1.5px solid var(--border); font-size: 14px; }
  .form-field input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--blue); }

  .add-btn { width: 100%; padding: 11px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; background: var(--blue); color: white; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; margin-top: 2px; }
  .add-btn:hover { background: var(--navy); }

  .divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border); margin: 22px 0; }

  .manage-list-section .section-label .count { color: var(--blue); }

  .manage-list { max-height: 250px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; }
  .manage-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .manage-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .manage-row:hover { background: var(--blue-light); }
  .manage-row-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .manage-row-meta { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); }
  .delete-btn { background: var(--danger-light); color: var(--danger); border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; }
  .delete-btn:hover { background: #f8d3d3; }
  .delete-btn svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

  .modal-footer-note { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 18px; line-height: 1.6; }
  .reset-link { background: none; border: none; color: var(--danger); font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: underline; padding: 0; margin-top: 14px; }

  @media (max-width: 760px) {
    header.main-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
    .brand-logo-img { height: 52px; }
    .contact-info { flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
    .toolbar { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
    .tabs { justify-content: center; }
    .pagination { justify-content: center; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 520px) { .form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
</style>
</head>
<body>

  <div class="top-bar">QUALITY EDUCATION IS OUR TRADITION ROOTED IN FAITH, EXCELLENCE &amp; SERVICE</div>

  <header class="main-header">
    <div class="brand">
      <img class="brand-logo-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="St. Mary's College of Tagum, Inc. (SMCTI) logo">
    </div>

    <div class="contact-info">
      <div class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 0 1-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 4.11 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72c.13.96.36 1.9.7 2.81a2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 6 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45c.91.34 1.85.57 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div><div class="label">Call Support</div><div class="value">0991 966 6165</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div><div class="label">Email Support</div><div class="value">tep.sciencelab@smctagum.edu.ph</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13s-9-6-9-13a9 9 0 0 1 18 0z"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div><div class="label">Location</div><div class="value">Tagum City</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="toolbar">
    <div class="search-box">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/></svg>
      <input type="text" id="searchInput" aria-label="Search inventory" placeholder="Search inventory...">
    </div>

    <div class="tabs" role="tablist">
      <button type="button" class="tab-btn active" data-tab="chemical">Chemical</button>
      <button type="button" class="tab-btn" data-tab="apparatus">Apparatus</button>
      <button type="button" class="tab-btn" data-tab="slides">Prepared Slides</button>
    </div>

    <button type="button" class="menu-icon" id="menuBtn" aria-label="Manage inventory" title="Manage inventory (add or delete items)" aria-haspopup="dialog">
      <span></span><span></span><span></span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <main>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="table-scroll">
        <table>
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>#</th>
              <th id="nameHeader">Chemical Name</th>
              <th>Type</th>
              <th>Location</th>
              <th>Est. Quantity</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody id="tableBody"><tr><td colspan="5" class="empty-state">Loading inventory…</td></tr></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
      <div class="pagination" id="pagination"></div>
    </div>

    <footer class=.</footer>
  </main>

  <!-- ---------- Manage Inventory modal ---------- -->
  <div class="modal-overlay hidden" id="manageModal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="manageModalTitle">
    <div class="modal-panel">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <h2 id="manageModalTitle">Manage Inventory</h2>
        <button type="button" class="close-btn" id="closeModalBtn" aria-label="Close">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>

      <div class="modal-body">
        <div class="modal-tabs">
          <button type="button" class="modal-tab-btn active" data-cat="chemical">Chemical</button>
          <button type="button" class="modal-tab-btn" data-cat="apparatus">Apparatus</button>
          <button type="button" class="modal-tab-btn" data-cat="slides">Prepared Slides</button>
        </div>

        <div class="section-label">Add new item</div>
        <form id="addItemForm">
          <div class="form-grid">
            <div class="form-field">
              <label for="itemName">Name</label>
              <input type="text" id="itemName" required placeholder="e.g. Sodium Bicarbonate">
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <label for="itemType">Type</label>
              <input type="text" id="itemType" list="typeOptions" required placeholder="e.g. solid">
              <datalist id="typeOptions"></datalist>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <label for="itemLocation">Location</label>
              <input type="text" id="itemLocation" required placeholder="e.g. Cab. 1, Cub. 2">
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <label for="itemQty">Est. quantity</label>
              <input type="text" id="itemQty" required placeholder="e.g. 250 g">
            </div>
          </div>
          <button type="submit" class="add-btn">+ Add item</button>
        </form>

        <div class="divider"></div>

        <div class="manage-list-section">
          <div class="section-label">Current items (<span class="count" id="manageCount">0</span>)</div>
          <div class="manage-list" id="manageList"></div>
        </div>

        <p class="modal-footer-note">Changes here update the table right away and are saved automatically to this page, so they'll still be there the next time it's opened.</p>
        <button type="button" class="reset-link" id="resetBtn">Reset all data to sample defaults</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

<script>
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'smcti-lab-inventory-data';

  const DEFAULT_DATA = {
    chemical: {
      label: 'Chemical Name',
      items: [
        {id:'chem-1', name:'Ammonium Sulfate', type:'solid', location:'Cab. 1, left side, Cub. 1', qty:'1 kg'},
        {id:'chem-2', name:'Copper Sulfate', type:'solid', location:'Cab. 1, left side, Cub. 1', qty:'500 g'},
        {id:'chem-3', name:'Magnesium Sulfate', type:'solid', location:'Cab. 1, left side, Cub. 1', qty:'250 g'},
        {id:'chem-4', name:'Zinc Sulfate', type:'solid', location:'Cab. 1, left side, Cub. 1', qty:'250 g'},
        {id:'chem-5', name:'Sodium Chloride', type:'solid', location:'Cab. 1, left side, Cub. 2', qty:'1 kg'},
        {id:'chem-6', name:'Hydrochloric Acid', type:'liquid', location:'Cab. 2, acid section', qty:'500 mL'},
        {id:'chem-7', name:'Sodium Hydroxide', type:'solid', location:'Cab. 1, left side, Cub. 2', qty:'500 g'},
        {id:'chem-8', name:'Distilled Water', type:'liquid', location:'Cab. 3, bottom shelf', qty:'5 L'},
        {id:'chem-9', name:'Ethanol', type:'liquid', location:'Cab. 2, flammables', qty:'1 L'},
        {id:'chem-10', name:'Potassium Permanganate', type:'solid', location:'Cab. 1, right side, Cub. 1', qty:'100 g'},
      ]
    },
    apparatus: {
      label: 'Apparatus Name',
      items: [
        {id:'appa-1', name:'Beaker (250 mL)', type:'glass', location:'Cab. 4, shelf 1', qty:'12 pcs'},
        {id:'appa-2', name:'Test Tube', type:'glass', location:'Cab. 4, shelf 2', qty:'40 pcs'},
        {id:'appa-3', name:'Bunsen Burner', type:'equipment', location:'Cab. 5, top shelf', qty:'8 pcs'},
        {id:'appa-4', name:'Graduated Cylinder (100 mL)', type:'glass', location:'Cab. 4, shelf 1', qty:'10 pcs'},
        {id:'appa-5', name:'Compound Microscope', type:'equipment', location:'Cab. 6, secured cabinet', qty:'6 units'},
        {id:'appa-6', name:'Tripod Stand', type:'equipment', location:'Cab. 5, bottom shelf', qty:'8 pcs'},
        {id:'appa-7', name:'Erlenmeyer Flask (250 mL)', type:'glass', location:'Cab. 4, shelf 2', qty:'15 pcs'},
        {id:'appa-8', name:'Wire Gauze', type:'equipment', location:'Cab. 5, shelf 2', qty:'10 pcs'},
      ]
    },
    slides: {
      label: 'Slide Name',
      items: [
        {id:'slide-1', name:'Onion Cell (Allium cepa)', type:'biological', location:'Cab. 7, slide box A', qty:'15 slides'},
        {id:'slide-2', name:'Human Cheek Cell', type:'biological', location:'Cab. 7, slide box A', qty:'15 slides'},
        {id:'slide-3', name:'Mitosis – Onion Root Tip', type:'prepared', location:'Cab. 7, slide box B', qty:'10 slides'},
        {id:'slide-4', name:'Paramecium sp.', type:'biological', location:'Cab. 7, slide box B', qty:'8 slides'},
        {id:'slide-5', name:'Frog Blood Smear', type:'prepared', location:'Cab. 7, slide box C', qty:'6 slides'},
        {id:'slide-6', name:'Leaf Cross Section', type:'biological', location:'Cab. 7, slide box A', qty:'12 slides'},
      ]
    }
  };

  const TYPE_SUGGESTIONS = {
    chemical: ['solid', 'liquid', 'gas'],
    apparatus: ['glass', 'equipment'],
    slides: ['biological', 'prepared']
  };

  let DATA = null;
  let currentTab = 'chemical';
  let currentPage = 1;
  let manageCategory = 'chemical';
  const PAGE_SIZE = 4;

  function clone(x) { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(x)); }
  function escapeHtml(str) {
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.textContent = String(str);
    return d.innerHTML;
  }
  function slugify(str) {
    return (String(str).toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/(^-|-$)/g, '')) || 'other';
  }
  function genId(cat) { return cat + '-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000); }
  function hasStorage() { return typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.storage && typeof window.storage.get === 'function'; }

  async function loadData() {
    if (!hasStorage()) { DATA = clone(DEFAULT_DATA); return; }
    try {
      const result = await window.storage.get(STORAGE_KEY, false);
      DATA = result && result.value ? JSON.parse(result.value) : clone(DEFAULT_DATA);
      if (!result) await saveData();
    } catch (err) {
      DATA = clone(DEFAULT_DATA);
      try { await saveData(); } catch (e2) {}
    }
  }

  async function saveData() {
    if (!hasStorage()) return;
    try { await window.storage.set(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(DATA), false); }
    catch (err) { console.error('Inventory save failed', err); }
  }

  /* ---------- Main table render ---------- */
  function render() {
    const dataset = DATA[currentTab];
    document.getElementById('nameHeader').textContent = dataset.label;

    const query = document.getElementById('searchInput').value.trim().toLowerCase();
    const filtered = dataset.items.filter(item => item.name.toLowerCase().includes(query));

    const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filtered.length / PAGE_SIZE));
    if (currentPage > totalPages) currentPage = totalPages;
    const start = (currentPage - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;
    const pageItems = filtered.slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE);

    const tbody = document.getElementById('tableBody');
    if (pageItems.length === 0) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="5" class="empty-state">No matching items found.</td></tr>';
    } else {
      tbody.innerHTML = pageItems.map((item, i) => `
        <tr>
          <td>${start + i + 1}</td>
          <td>${escapeHtml(item.name)}</td>
          <td><span class="type-badge type-${slugify(item.type)}">${escapeHtml(item.type)}</span></td>
          <td>${escapeHtml(item.location)}</td>
          <td>${escapeHtml(item.qty)}</td>
        </tr>
      `).join('');
    }

    const pag = document.getElementById('pagination');
    let html = '';
    for (let p = 1; p <= totalPages; p++) {
      html += `<button type="button" class="page-btn ${p === currentPage ? 'active' : ''}" data-page="${p}">${p}</button>`;
    }
    html += `<button type="button" class="page-btn" id="nextBtn" ${currentPage >= totalPages ? 'disabled' : ''}>NEXT</button>`;
    pag.innerHTML = html;

    pag.querySelectorAll('.page-btn[data-page]').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => { currentPage = parseInt(btn.dataset.page, 10); render(); });
    });
    document.getElementById('nextBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (currentPage < totalPages) { currentPage++; render(); }
    });
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');
      currentTab = btn.dataset.tab;
      currentPage = 1;
      render();
    });
  });
  document.getElementById('searchInput').addEventListener('input', () => { currentPage = 1; render(); });

  /* ---------- Manage modal ---------- */
  function updateTypeOptions() {
    document.getElementById('typeOptions').innerHTML =
      TYPE_SUGGESTIONS[manageCategory].map(t => `<option value="${t}">`).join('');
  }

  function renderManageList() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.modal-tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.cat === manageCategory));
    updateTypeOptions();

    const items = DATA[manageCategory].items;
    document.getElementById('manageCount').textContent = items.length;

    const listEl = document.getElementById('manageList');
    if (items.length === 0) {
      listEl.innerHTML = '<p class="empty-state">No items yet — add one above.</p>';
      return;
    }
    listEl.innerHTML = items.map(item => `
      <div class="manage-row">
        <div class="manage-row-main">
          <div class="manage-row-name">${escapeHtml(item.name)}</div>
          <div class="manage-row-meta">
            <span class="type-badge type-${slugify(item.type)}">${escapeHtml(item.type)}</span>
            <span>${escapeHtml(item.location)}</span>
            <span>${escapeHtml(item.qty)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <button type="button" class="delete-btn" data-id="${item.id}" aria-label="Delete ${escapeHtml(item.name)}">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="3,6 5,6 21,6"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6"/><path d="M10 11v6"/><path d="M14 11v6"/><path d="M9 6V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h4a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v2"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
    `).join('');

    listEl.querySelectorAll('.delete-btn').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => deleteItem(manageCategory, btn.dataset.id));
    });
  }

  async function deleteItem(category, id) {
    const item = DATA[category].items.find(it => it.id === id);
    if (!item) return;
    if (!confirm(`Delete "${item.name}"? This can't be undone.`)) return;
    DATA[category].items = DATA[category].items.filter(it => it.id !== id);
    await saveData();
    renderManageList();
    if (currentTab === category) render();
  }

  document.getElementById('addItemForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const name = document.getElementById('itemName').value.trim();
    const type = document.getElementById('itemType').value.trim();
    const location = document.getElementById('itemLocation').value.trim();
    const qty = document.getElementById('itemQty').value.trim();
    if (!name || !type || !location || !qty) return;

    DATA[manageCategory].items.push({ id: genId(manageCategory), name, type: type.toLowerCase(), location, qty });
    await saveData();
    e.target.reset();
    renderManageList();
    if (currentTab === manageCategory) render();
    document.getElementById('itemName').focus();
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.modal-tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => { manageCategory = btn.dataset.cat; renderManageList(); });
  });

  function openManageModal() {
    manageCategory = currentTab;
    renderManageList();
    document.getElementById('manageModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('itemName').focus(), 50);
  }
  function closeManageModal() {
    document.getElementById('manageModal').classList.add('hidden');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
    document.getElementById('menuBtn').focus();
  }

  document.getElementById('menuBtn').addEventListener('click', openManageModal);
  document.getElementById('closeModalBtn').addEventListener('click', closeManageModal);
  document.getElementById('manageModal').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (e.target.id === 'manageModal') closeManageModal();
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && !document.getElementById('manageModal').classList.contains('hidden')) closeManageModal();
  });

  document.getElementById('resetBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
    if (!confirm('Reset ALL categories back to the sample defaults? This removes any items you added and cannot be undone.')) return;
    DATA = clone(DEFAULT_DATA);
    await saveData();
    renderManageList();
    render();
  });

  /* ---------- Init ---------- */
  (async function init() {
    await loadData();
    render();
  })();
</script>
</body>
</html>
